title: Red XP
description: Your XP bar is too boring for you. Download Red XP bar now to give your XP bar a new touch.
body:
# Red XP

![red-xp-banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd529414278663590951587a1d8995f02ecafc9f.png)

Your XP bar is too boring for you. Download Red XP bar now to give your XP bar a new touch.


**_Requires Optifine or Animatica._**
